overall.description: A samurai warrior rides a horse through a blooming grassland at sunset in this cinematic game footage. The camera follows from behind as the character moves through tall grass past cherry blossom trees, with mountains visible in the distance, before slowing to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant mountains and blooming trees

agents.ego_description: riding a horse steadily through the tall grass toward the setting sun, with bow and quiver visible on back

notable_agents.action: horse trotting steadily through the tall grass carrying the rider

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground, swaying slightly in the breeze
distant mountain silhouettes forming the horizon backdrop
bright setting sun creating strong lens flare and backlighting
cluster of white-flowering trees lining the right side of the field
dark smoke rising in the distance on the left side against the mountains

segments.scene_description: The samurai rides steadily through the tall grass of an open field, heading toward the setting sun. Distant mountains frame the horizon while blooming cherry trees line the right side of the path, and a thin plume of smoke rises on the left.

events.description: horse gradually slows from a trot to a walk as it approaches the trees
horse comes to a complete stop beside the blooming cherry trees

agents.ego_description: slowing the horse to a halt near the cherry tree grove, remaining seated on the stationary mount

notable_agents.action: horse slowing to a stop and standing still beside the trees

segments.scene_description: The horse slows its pace as they approach the grove of blooming cherry trees. The rider comes to a stop with the sun now positioned to the left, casting long shadows across the grassland while the mount stands still.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a blooming grassland that transitions from a steady ride toward the horizon to a quiet, stationary moment under the setting sun. It begins with the samurai riding steadily through tall grass, moving toward distant mountains while blooming cherry trees line the path and a thin plume of smoke rises in the distance. As the rider approaches the grove of cherry trees, the horse gradually slows its pace. The scene then shifts as the rider comes to a complete stop, with the sun repositioning to the left to cast long, dramatic shadows across the grassland. Finally, the camera lingers on the mount standing still amidst the quiet landscape.
